regional_summary_6h.headline: MENA threat index 2.07 (STABLE, steady) driven by Iran, Oman

bullets.text: Iran's ongoing military conflict and missile programme are key contributors to regional instability
Oman's rejection of Hormuz transit fees and backing of international law amid Iran war tensions demonstrate its diplomatic efforts
The Iran-Oman dynamic is influencing the broader regional security landscape, with other countries like the UAE and Israel also impacted by the conflict
